mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (user_id, title, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.created_at, u.username AS author_username, COALESCE(l.like_count, 0) AS like_count FROM posts p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM post_likes GROUP BY post_id ) l ON l.post_id = p.id ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.created_at, u.username AS author_username, COALESCE(l.like_count, 0) AS like_count FROM posts p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM post_likes GROUP BY post_id ) l ON l.post_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
